title: Luxe Escapes
description: Explore this luxurious mansion, accommodating 30 guests with 16 bedrooms and 35 bathrooms. Perfect for unforgettable gatherings or a lavish getaway.
indoor: Elegantly designed luxurious vacation rental space
outdoor: Luxurious mansion with stunning outdoor features
amenities: Air conditioning, Essentials, Heating, Hot water, Kitchen, TV, Washer, Wifi, Carbon monoxide alarm, Fire extinguisher, First aid kit, Smoke alarm, Dedicated workspace, Coffee maker, Cooking basics, Dining table, Dishes and silverware, Dishwasher, Refrigerator, Free parking on premises, Cleaning available during stay
nearbyPlaces: World-class restaurants, historical landmarks, green spaces, and cafes within walking distance. Explore the White House and relax at Lafayette Square.
